---
title: "Susan Mohammad"
---

## Welcome
I am a data-driven professional specializing in **Econometrics, Continuous Improvement, and Process Automation**. My background combines over seven years of experience in the banking and IT industries.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### 🛠 Technical Toolbox

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| **Programming** | R (Tidyverse, Shiny, Quarto), Python (Pandas, Numpy), SQL |
| **Quantitative** | Econometric Modeling, Time Series Analysis, Hypothesis Testing, Machine Learning |
| **Automation** | Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate), RPA, GitHub Actions, SharePoint |
:::

## 🚀 Featured Projects

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### QEvent Application
**The Tech:** R & Shiny, SQLite.
**Impact:** Streamlines data collection and event logic, allowing speakers to filter questions and preventing event chaos.
[View Project](https://github.com/susanmohammadk22/QEvent)
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### Flight Delay Prediction (DFW)
**The Tech:** Python, Lasso & Random Forest Regressions.
**Insight:** Analyzes weather impact and propagated delays at DFW Airport to improve operational efficiency.
:::
